layer: 2 x O x I x factor,  factor = max(act_bits, wgt_bits)/8    [NVFP4 x NVFP4 → max(4,4)/8 = 0.5]
params x (scale_bits/8)    [FP16 scale → x2.0, FP8 scale → x1.0]
(2 x rank x I + 2 x O x rank) x (16/8)    [lora_a + lora_b, both FP16 → x2.0]
in_features x (16/8)    [per-channel FP16 element-wise multiply → x2.0]
in_features x 2 x (act_bits/8)    [quantize + dequantize overhead, 0 if FP16]
alpha=0.5, FP16 per-channel scale → factor x2.0
